articles.title: Scientists say this type of olive oil could boost brain power

articles.title: The surprising reason you’re so productive one day and not the next

articles.title: Doing this throughout life may cut Alzheimer’s risk by 38%
articles.excerpt: A lifetime of mental stimulation—like reading, writing, and learning new skills—may help protect the brain as we age. People with the highest levels of cognitive enrichment had a much lower risk of Alzheimer’s and experienced symptoms years

articles.title: Lonely people have worse memory but don’t decline faster, study finds

articles.title: Your nose could detect Alzheimer’s years before symptoms begin
articles.excerpt: Losing your sense of smell might signal Alzheimer’s far earlier than expected. Scientists found that immune cells in the brain actively destroy smell-related nerve fibers after detecting abnormal signals on their surfaces. This damage begin

articles.title: Freeze-Dried Platelets Combat TBI Brain Swelling and Bleeding
articles.excerpt: Thrombosomes, a freeze-dried blood product, can stop brain swelling and stabilize leaky blood vessels after traumatic brain injury.

articles.title: Dopamine Depletion: The Hidden Driver of Alzheimer’s Memory Loss
articles.excerpt: A new study identifies dopamine dysfunction in the entorhinal cortex as a central cause of Alzheimer’s memory impairment.

articles.title: 3D Bio-Hybrid Device Merges Neurons and Computing
articles.excerpt: A 3D bio-hybrid device uses a microscopic metal mesh to grow and "program" living brain cells for computation.

articles.title: How Down Syndrome Reshapes the Developing Brain
articles.excerpt: A new study provides a cellular-resolution map of Down syndrome brain development, identifying a depletion of progenitor cells as the cause of smaller brain size.

articles.title: Emotional Touch Leaves a Permanent Mark on the Mind
articles.excerpt: Researchers propose a new model for how the brain encodes and recalls emotionally meaningful touch, highlighting its role in lifelong mental health.

articles.title: Stroke Impact Determines Future Dementia Risk
articles.excerpt: A 30-year study of 42,000 adults shows that stroke severity is a primary driver of post-stroke dementia and accelerated brain aging.

articles.title: GLP-1 Drugs Target the Roots of Dementia
articles.excerpt: A comprehensive review of 30 studies finds that GLP-1 receptor agonists are effective at tackling the biological drivers of Alzheimer’s disease.

articles.title: 25% of Chronic Pain Patients Show ADHD Traits
articles.excerpt: A study of 1,000 Japanese patients reveals that undiagnosed ADHD traits may be a hidden driver behind treatment-resistant chronic pain.

articles.title: The End of One-Size-Fits-All Enterprise Software
